author: shadowoption
description: Import notes and images from Hunchly.

manifest.author: Maltego GmBH
manifest.description: This plugin converts an Hunchly case into Obsidian notes enriching the data along the way.
manifest.name: Hunchly

name: Hunchly

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**What's Changed**

- Hunchly captures (Screenshots) are added along with the extracted data.
- Named Entity recognitions is run on the captures to identify people, places and orgs.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shadowoption/Hunchly-obsidian-plugin/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

* #3 - Fix unzipper.extract by @divyabshiva in https://github.com/shadowoption/Hunchly-obsidian-plugin/pull/4
